task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Odoo dashboard or app menu after successful login.
Screenshots show the 'Departments' list or the 'New Department' form within the Employees app.
Screenshots show 'Product Management' entered into the 'Department Name' field in the creation form.
Screenshots show 'Tina Williamson' selected in the 'Manager' field in the department creation form.
Screenshots show the saved department record for 'Product Management' with manager 'Tina Williamson' (e.g., in a read-only view or listed in the departments overview).

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Odoo
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8069 and the Odoo interface is visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to insert the record
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of terminal windows running psql or other database clients to manipulate the database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a department named 'Product Management' with 'Tina Williamson' as the manager in Odoo at http://localhost:8069. Tina Williamson is an existing employee in the Odoo demo data. The credentials are admin/admin.
